calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-22-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Nici Rodich.
Petitioner: Min Ru Jiang (Mother) present in pro per as Guardian at litem for Minor Ying Yun Wang was sworn and examined with the help of an interpreter.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing. Notice was given to the father and was mailed at his address in China with the hearing date.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: KELLY YING YUN WANG.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-20-2006 Reset To Aug-22-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Sauceda.
Petitioner: Min Ru Jiang, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Ying yun Wang, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Charles Zhang.
Unable to provide the Court with proof of signature on the declartion by Mr. Ye Fu Wang, the minor's father, matter is continued to Aug. 22, 2006 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of signature, or request for an Order dispensing notice.
